title: How does a Helium Drive sound? (HC520 )
notes: Single helium enterprise drive. Good startup envelope and post-ready behavior. Minor room coloration.

title: HDD Noise, Dual HDD Spin Up and Down Sound
notes: User-provided clip, but dual-drive and enclosure interaction are mixed. Use only as a low-confidence envelope reference.

title: Western Digital Ultrastar DC HC550 18TB #1 (good) and #2 (bad) - Spin up/down
notes: Single-drive startup/spindown capture. Good for startup timing and low-band growth; ignore the later bad-drive portion.

title: Western Digital Ultrastar DC HC530 WUH721414ALE600 - Hard Drive Spin Up
notes: Close-mic spin-up clip with little non-drive content. Strong startup-only reference.

title: Helium  Ultrastar DC HC530 & Nomal HDD SOUND TEST
notes: Comparison clip. Use the first startup segment only; later commentary/comparison sections are less reliable.

title: 7200rpm Hard Drive running without the cover
notes: Open-cover desktop drive. Keep only for later seek/steady-state calibration, not startup acceptance.

title: Western Digital (WD) Hard Drive Preemptive Wear Leveling (PWL) Noise / Thump
notes: Short periodic maintenance thump. Useful for later background-maintenance calibration, not startup.

title: Awesome Seeking Sound
notes: Aggressive seek-heavy clip. Useful as a later-phase tick/settle reference if the drive remains isolated enough.
